title: From IC to Manager: What Nobody Tells You
excerpt: The hardest part of becoming a manager isn't learning new skills — it's unlearning the ones that made you a great engineer.

title: Lessons from Operating S3: Designing for Failure at Scale
excerpt: Every system will fail. The question is whether you designed it to fail gracefully or catastrophically — and what S3's cellular architecture taught me about that.

title: The Amazon SDM Interview: What I Wish I'd Known
excerpt: A candid walkthrough of the SDM interview loop — the bar raiser, leadership principles deep-dives, and the system design questions that actually matter.
